seoTitle: Eli Waters vs Ellangowan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eli Waters and Ellangowan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eli Waters vs Ellangowan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eli Waters and Ellangowan.
heading: Eli Waters vs Ellangowan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eli Waters, Queensland and Ellangowan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellangowan has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Eli Waters (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eli Waters or Ellangowan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eli Waters has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Ellangowan scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eli Waters scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Ellangowan scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eli Waters or Ellangowan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellangowan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
